caption:
The lecture hall smelled of old paper and anticipation, a perfect storm for anything interesting to happen. I adjusted the strap of my silk blouse, feeling the weight of my curves shifting subtly beneath the fabric, a secret only I knew about. My name is Clara, and today I was teaching Advanced Aesthetics, but for a few chosen students, it was more of a private show than a lesson. I leaned forward, my chest rising and falling with a dramatic breath, and the air crackled. Someone whispered, 'She's not just teaching, is she?' I smiled, letting my fingers trail down my own collarbone, just enough to make the fabric cling. The camera flash from a student's phone wasn't caught, but the memory of that look burned. We were all learning, and for now, the classroom was our playground. 📚✨🍑👠
